citations.narrative:
The inventory of animals on hand was not available. Several animals including livestock and birds were observed on
exhibit during the inspection.
A complete record of animals is required to track animals being used in regulated activities to ensure their humane care
and use.
The facility must maintain records containing the required information for animals which fully and correctly disclose the
number of animals held in their possession.
Correct by: April 2, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
